membership.bodyHtml:
Membership
Welcome to the special place for Jyumyou
♡ ♡ ♡
By joining the YouTube Membership, you can enjoy a variety of perks!
All plans include the benefits of plans below them.
Starting from ¥140/month.
Join Now 🤍
Asobu's Deep Mercy
¥140 / A gracious blessing
¥140 / month

Included perks:

  • ⋈Member badge
  • ⋈Emojis

Don't expect perks for ¥140, okay?

Asobu's Cute Jyumyou
¥490 / Members-only perks

¥490 / month

Included perks:

  • ⋈Member badge
  • ⋈Emojis
  • ⋈Members-only chat
  • ⋈Members-only livestreams
  • ⋈Members-only videos
  • ⋈Members-only shorts
  • ⋈Personal shoutouts to members
Jyumyou Alliance
About Jyumyou Alliance
Upper plans / Exclusive merch system / Shipping

Jyumyou Alliance refers to all YouTube Membership plans at ¥1,990 or above.

🎁
Exclusive Merch
Limited merch gifts (no restocks or reruns) given out irregularly every 2–6 months!
Schedule announced to members only; photos revealed at unboxing streams.
💳
Member Card
Receive after 1 year of continuous membership! A special card with Asobu's signature, your name, and an issue number 🤍
📝
Members-Only Posts
Merch schedules and daily life posts shared exclusively on Discord/YouTube for members. No public announcements.
⋈ Example Schedule
Example: White Day merch would look like ↓
Jan
Announce &
Ship Request
Feb
Production
Mar
Delivery ♡
Unboxing
Photo reveal &
SNS post unlocked
If you submit a shipping request while enrolled in January, you can still receive the merch even if you cancel in February.
This schedule is just an example. Please check the actual schedule after joining the Jyumyou Alliance.
  • ⋈Not submitting a shipping request is considered opting out of the gift.
  • ⋈You are responsible for the BOOTH service fee and shipping costs only.
  • ⋈Each person may receive one free item per round. Additional items can be purchased.
  • ⋈Due to made-to-order production, cancellations and refunds are not available.
  • ⋈Merch will still be shipped even if you cancel after submitting a shipping request. Contact us with your order number if you no longer need it.
Connected Lifespan
¥1,990 / Jyumyou Alliance + Exclusive merch + Posts + X private account

¥1,990 / month
Jyumyou Alliance Access

Access to Jyumyou Alliance perks on Discord! Continuous membership for 1 year earns you a signed Member Card! Core perks include exclusive merch, posts, and the X private account.

Note: Please follow the guide video to link your Discord and YouTube accounts. If you don't have a Discord account, please create one.

Post Viewing Rights

Read my written posts and diary entries! Topics include daily life, new projects, and progress updates. Posted at least once a month.

Exclusive Merch

Merch gifts are not monthly — they're an irregular perk every 2–6 months.
Details revealed only to Jyumyou Alliance! Check announcements and submit your shipping request!

Invited to X Private Account!

You can follow the Jyumyou Alliance-exclusive X account!
It's not a secret account though lol

Past Videos

Watch videos and stream archives from before my activity as Mitarai Asobu!

Verified Lifespan
¥2,790 / Lower perks + Signed shikishi + Limited voice

¥2,790 / month
Signed Shikishi

I'll gift you a hand-signed shikishi card! Each one has different content — a truly one-of-a-kind card 🤍
Delivery timing aligns with the Jyumyou Alliance exclusive merch. Shipping request must be submitted to receive it.

Limited-Time Voice

At least one seasonal voice clip (morning / goodnight, etc.) posted per month! Voice data is downloadable during the availability period. After the period, it becomes private.

Bonded Lifespan
¥4,690 / Lower perks + Private one-on-one stream + Digital art request

¥4,690 / month
Private One-on-One Livestream 🤍

Sometimes it's nice to just talk one-on-one, right? It could be your chance to share something you've wanted to say... Questions, chatting, advice, gaming, drawing... what do you want to do? Book a time that works for you. Please reserve at least 15 minutes!

The archive will generally be limited to just you, but if there's extreme misbehavior, it may be made public 🖤

Digital Art Request

I'll gift you an illustration I drew! Perfect for an SNS icon or phone wallpaper — a memorable piece just for you!

※ The illustration may only be used by the requester themselves. It will be drawn during a stream! Subjects can include your favorite anime characters, cars, bikes, a self-portrait of me — anything goes. Quality will be similar to what I typically draw during my participatory drawing streams.

Synced Lifespan
¥14,000 / Lower perks + Custom script message video

¥14,000 / month
Custom Script Message Video

You can tell me exactly what to say...🤍 Send me a script or just a scenario and I'll do my best to write one! Length is negotiable — I'll do what I can. Don't hold back! Send your script via X or Discord after joining.

※ I may ask for revisions if there's content I can't do. Don't send anything too embarrassing. But hey, try sending it anyway — nothing ventured, nothing gained!

Asobu's Wonderful Gentleman Lifespan 🤍
¥68,000 / An overwhelming difference in status

¥68,000 / month
Showing off to other viewers 🤍

Demonstrate your overwhelming superiority to the rest of the audience!

♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu
